---
title: "Project title (replace)"
sidebar: false
resources:
  - slides.pdf
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

<div class="project-pdf-slides-root" hidden aria-hidden="true"></div>

:::: {.project-pdf-slides-intro}

Short hook (1-3 sentences). Do not repeat the full story here if **Project Overview** below covers it.
::::

## Project Overview

*WHAT this deck is for: problem, context, goals, stakeholders, final deliverable (the PDF).*

### Problem

### Context

### Goals

### Stakeholders

### Final deliverable

## Project Approach

*HOW you structured the deck: scope, assumptions, evidence, slide logic, arc, constraints. Pre-build planning note: write this **before** the deck exists. **Past** for audience/context; **future / “planned”** for what the slides will do.*

### Problem Definition

- **Context:** who needed what and why (past or present situation).
- **Goal (planned):** what the deck will accomplish.

### Scope & Assumptions

- **Scope (planned):** time, depth, case setting.
- **Assumptions:** what the audience will already know.

### Data Sources

- **Planned evidence:** figures, examples, or citations the deck will use.

### Analytical Design

- **Planned structure:** order and emphasis of the argument.

### Workflow / Process

- **Planned arc** (e.g. problem → methods → results → implications).

### Constraints & Considerations

- Time limit, sensitivity, or claims you will **avoid**.

## Impact & Outcome

Outcomes and who benefited.

:::: {.pdf-slides-embed-bar}
[Open PDF in new tab](slides.pdf){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
::::

:::: {#pdf-slides-frame-wrap .pdf-slides-embed-full}
<iframe src="slides.pdf" title="Slides (PDF)" class="pdf-slides-embed"></iframe>
::::
